specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive customers who completed dealership test drives in 2024 proceeded to purchase within 60 days?
answer: In 2024, 28% of customers who completed Elexion Automotive dealership test drives proceeded to purchase within 60 days, indicating a significant drop-off after initial contact with the customers.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
